--- TEST: summarize never gonna give you up rick astley ---
SHRRI: Found — https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
SHRRI: Found — https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PZbRSWHSPBQ
Since the video transcript is not available, I will provide a general summary of the song's lyrics based on my knowledge.

The song "Never Gonna Give You Up" by Rick Astley is a romantic ballad that expresses a deep emotional commitment to a loved one. Here is a concise summary of the song's lyrics in 5 bullet points:

• The singer acknowledges that they are no strangers to love and that they know the rules of a relationship.
• They express a full commitment to the person they love and promise to never give them up.
• The singer understands that their partner's heart has been aching, but they are too shy to express their feelings.
• They assure their partner that they will never let them down, never make them cry, and never say goodbye.
• The singer repeats their promise to never give their partner up, emphasizing their commitment and devotion.
